cycle.contract: Select the smallest local-first orchestration slice and check conflicts with Supervisor, Adapter, Command Center, Gate, and Eval lanes.
Apply deterministic workflow, scheduler, registry, run-manager, status, trace, or validation changes without external services.
Write updated contracts, simulated trace, audit/eval handoff records, and .agentops/status/workflow-scheduler.json.
Run the smallest feasible validation, at minimum node .agentops/scripts/check-agentops.mjs.
Report files changed, checks run, risks, and next handoff.

tickContract.idempotency: A tick may rewrite deterministic demo trace/status but must not mutate source matter data or start a daemon.
tickContract.operatorControl: Each phase is resumable and inspectable. An operator can take over at any gate or humanCheckpoint.
